title: GeoMERIT: an open-source tool for reproducible target-specific selection of near-surface geophysical methods
description: GeoMERIT (Geophysical Method Evaluation and Ranking by Investigation Target) is an open-source, knowledge-based tool that ranks nine common near-surface geophysical methods (ERT, IP, SP, GPR, TEM, seismic refraction, magnetometry, gravity, and radiometric) for a stated investigation target. It uses a weighted sum model over an explicit, literature-derived method-by-target physical-property-contrast matrix, so that recommendations are conditioned on the physics of the specific target and every element of a recommendation is inspectable and reproducible. This archive contains the source code, the machine-readable literature benchmark, the reproduction scripts, and the accompanying manuscript.

creators.name: Elwaheidi, Mahmoud M.
creators.affiliation: Department of Geology and Geophysics, College of Science, King Saud University, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
